demo.title: incorporate.ts

setup: Call incorporate({ denominacion, tipo: 'SOCIEDAD-IA', capitalSocial: 1, objeto }) — it POSTs to https://ar-agents.ar/api/auto-incorporate
Present the returned one-click deploy URL and the signed audit URL to the user
Pass an optional human representante (art. 88/92) when available for the human-in-the-loop attachment point
